verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O Lord, Your tenderness Melting all my bitterness O Lord, I receive Your love O Lord, Your loveliness Changing all my ugliness O Lord, I receive Your love O Lord, I receive Your love O Lord, I receive Your love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I love Him, I love Him Because He first loved me And purchased my salvation On Calvary's tree.
